title: Jammies
description: Have mobs dance next to active jukeboxes
body: Get ready for a dance-off in Minecraft with Jammies! This mod brings fun and lively dance animations to the world of mobs. Skeletons and Zombies groove to the rhythm when a Jukebox starts playing. But that's just the beginning – we have plans to expand this dance extravaganza to various other mobs in the future. Join the party and download Jammies now
